name: Canadian Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine 1 cup of water, potato, onion, carrots, and celery. Heat, covered, in microwave oven for 8 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except parsley, and heat, covered, for 5 minutes or until the soup bubbles and the cheese has melted. Stir occasionally.
3. Serve garnished with chopped parsley.
